title: pilosella fennica subsp. diatenta
intro: Pilosella fennica subsp. diatenta, a lesser-known species within the Pilosella genus, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the dandelion family. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which are attributed to the presence of sesquiterpene lactones and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Pilosella fennica subsp. diatenta include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in the form of infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, although its usage and preparation may vary depending on the specific application and cultural tradition.
